download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Download and install NexoAccManager on your device

reqsList.mac: macOS 11 Big Sur or higher · 4GB RAM · 500MB space
reqsList.linux: Ubuntu 20.04 / Debian 11 or higher · 4GB RAM · 500MB space

stepsWindows.1: Download the .exe installer from GitHub Releases
stepsWindows.2: Run the installer and follow the setup wizard
stepsWindows.3: Launch NexoAccManager from the Start Menu
stepsWindows.4: Sign in with your NexoAccManager account

stepsMac.1: Download the .dmg file from GitHub Releases
stepsMac.2: Open the .dmg and drag NexoAccManager to Applications
stepsMac.3: Launch NexoAccManager from Launchpad (allow if prompted)
stepsMac.4: Sign in with your NexoAccManager account

stepsLinux.1: Download the .AppImage file from GitHub Releases
stepsLinux.4: Sign in with your NexoAccManager account
